confirmation_text: Application Submitted — Your application has been submitted successfully. Good luck!
confirmation_method: no-account confirmation page (green checkmark) + URL changed to /apply/submitted; visually verified
resume_attached: resume.pdf (tailored for this role; verified via el.files[0].name == 'resume.pdf')
cover_letter: pasted as clean plain text into the Breezy cover-letter textarea (2259 chars); also rendered as cover_letter.pdf in role folder

ats_mechanics_learned.linkedin_routing: LinkedIn job 4423586852 = external 'Apply' (Responses managed off LinkedIn) -> opens new tab to Breezy HR. NOT Easy Apply.
ats_mechanics_learned.breezy_form: Single-page form at /p/<id>/apply. Fields: cResume (file, required), cName, cEmail, cPhoneNumber (required text), smsConsent (checkbox), cCoverLetter (textarea, optional), hp_7f2b (HONEYPOT — leave empty), 8 screening questions named section_<ts>_question_0..7 (radios + text + textarea).
ats_mechanics_learned.resume_upload: input[type=file]#main-attachment (name=cResume) — set_input_files works directly; Breezy shows 'Attached' + filename after ~3s parse.
ats_mechanics_learned.radio_matching: Radios have no id; match by associated <label> innerText. check(force=True) needed (custom-styled).
ats_mechanics_learned.submit_button: button:has-text('Submit Application'); success -> URL /apply/submitted + 'Application Submitted' green-check page.
ats_mechanics_learned.no_account_no_captcha: Breezy = no account, no captcha for this posting — clean AUTO-SUBMIT lane.
